name: feedbackiq_seed
description: Small golden evaluation dataset for FeedbackIQ RAG analysis and workflow quality checks.

examples.feedback_text: Payment failed during checkout and refund was delayed.
examples.notes: Payment failure should route to the payment team and escalate.

examples.feedback_text: The shipment was delayed and delivery tracking never updated.
examples.notes: Delivery delay should route to logistics without high-severity escalation.

examples.feedback_text: The checkout button is confusing on the mobile screen.
examples.notes: UI usability feedback should route to frontend.

examples.feedback_text: I noticed possible fraud and a security breach on my account.
examples.notes: Security breach should be treated as highest severity.
